note: Fullcalendar View is a Views style plugin (no config entity, no settings form) plus a small service/plugin-type API and an AJAX date-update route. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) probing documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I want to display content on a calendar. Which module provides this, what is the Views style/format plugin id, and what is its label in the Format list?
evals.expected_output: Full Calendar View provides a Views style plugin with id fullcalendar_view_display, shown as 'Full Calendar Display' in a View's Format setting.

evals.prompt: I added a Full Calendar Display format to a View but no events show. Which View field must I map in the style settings for events to appear, and which style options set the start/end dates?
evals.expected_output: You must add a date field to the View and map it as the start-date field via the `start` style option (required); `end` optionally maps an end-date field, `title` the event title.

evals.prompt: What calendar view modes can Full Calendar View show, and what is the default view mode value used by the style plugin?
evals.expected_output: Month (dayGridMonth), week (timeGridWeek), day (timeGridDay) and list (listYear) views; default_view defaults to dayGridMonth (default_mobile_view defaults to listYear).

evals.prompt: In Full Calendar View, how do editors reschedule an event by dragging it, which style option must be enabled, and which route/controller persists the new date?
evals.expected_output: Enable the 'Update allowed' option (updateAllowed=1); dragging posts to the fullcalendar_view.update_event route (/fullcalendar-view-event-update), handled by CalendarEventController::updateEvent, which validates a CSRF token and writes the new start/end to the entity.

evals.prompt: Which front-end JavaScript library powers Full Calendar View, and does it require me to install it manually or does it load automatically?
evals.expected_output: It is powered by the FullCalendar JavaScript library (with Moment.js and RRule); by default the libraries load from CDN via hook_library_info_alter, and are only served locally if you download them into /libraries/...

evals.prompt: How do I show recurring events on a Full Calendar View calendar? Which field/style option controls recurrence?
evals.expected_output: Add a plain-text field containing an RRULE string and select it as the RRule field (the `rrule` style option); an optional duration field sets each instance's length.

evals.prompt: I want another module to alter the calendar's preprocess variables in Full Calendar View. Which plugin type do I implement and what base class / manager does it use?
evals.expected_output: Implement a FullcalendarViewProcessor plugin (annotation @FullcalendarViewProcessor) extending FullcalendarViewProcessorBase (process(&$variables)); managed by plugin.manager.fullcalendar_view_processor in Plugin/FullcalendarViewProcessor.

evals.prompt: Where do I configure Full Calendar View settings — is there an admin settings page? How do I set event colors by content type or taxonomy?
evals.expected_output: There is no global settings form; all settings live in the View's Full Calendar Display Format/style options. Color events by bundle via color_bundle, or by a taxonomy field via tax_field/vocabularies (backed by the fullcalendar_view.taxonomy_color service).
